scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Note: this is a pnpm-first monorepo; pnpm is recommended for installs." >&2 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && BASE_PATH=/ PORT=3000 pnpm --filter @workspace/risk-coordinator --filter @workspace/api-server --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
